author: codex-agent

patch.value: External report reproduced in this repository: pm update currently rejects --clear-tests combined with --test, forcing manual remove/add loops through pm test for each linked test entry. This task adds explicit replacement semantics while preserving deterministic validation and backward compatibility.
Add deterministic linked-test replacement mode for update test mutations
Introduce a one-step replacement workflow for linked tests in pm update so operators can atomically clear and reseed tests without per-entry loops.
pm update supports deterministic one-step linked-test replacement semantics with clear CLI/help/contracts guidance and regression coverage for allowed/disallowed combinations.
Run pm update <id> --clear-tests --test command=... and observe conflict error requiring looped pm test operations

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence rerun via context list-open list-in-progress list-blocked and focused searches; no open direct equivalent for clear-tests plus test replacement.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Prefer explicit replacement flag or deterministic combined semantics while preserving existing conflict guards for other linked collections.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Linked-array mutation ergonomics need transaction-level shortcuts to avoid error-prone per-entry loops.

message: Create net-new task for update test replacement gap

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implementation start: add deterministic single-transaction linked-test replacement semantics in pm update (explicit replace path and/or clear+seed transaction support), preserve existing conflict checks for unrelated collection clears, and add unit/integration regression coverage for allowed and disallowed flag combinations.

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts tests/unit/pi-agent-extension.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts

author: codex-agent

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implemented deterministic linked-test replacement ergonomics via new --replace-tests update flag. Behavior: requires at least one --test entry, clears/reseeds tests atomically in one mutation transaction, rejects --replace-tests with --clear-tests, and preserves legacy --clear-tests + --test conflict guard. Also updated contracts/schema, shell completion surfaces (bash/zsh/fish), Pi wrapper mapping, and release-readiness expectations. Verification: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts tests/unit/pi-agent-extension.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts (passed).
